prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2.8L AAA VR6 (12v) with a custom Schrick 268° camshaft kit, ported and polished cylinder heads by VW Motorsport, and a custom 6-3-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold by Supersprint with a 3.5" Magnaflow cat-back system, paired with a K&N cold air intake (part #57-0501) for improved throttle response and a 20% increase in mid-range torque.

Upgraded 02A 5-speed transmission with a Sachs Performance Stage 3 clutch (part #3000951601) and a Quaife ATB helical LSD (part #QDF7J) for improved off-road and on-road traction, along with a custom 4Motion transfer case reinforcement plate by 034Motorsport to handle increased torque.

Custom ECU remap by APR (Stage 2+ with 98 RON fuel) targeting 220 HP and 250 Nm of torque, paired with a custom water-methanol injection kit by Snow Performance (part #200100) for detonation control, and a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (part #743347-1) with a custom intercooler setup by Wagner Tuning (part #81010.09.01) for forced induction reliability.
estetica: Custom Rallye-inspired widebody kit by Rocket Bunny (Pandem Golf Mk2 kit, part #PD-MK2-01), modified to fit the Golf Country’s raised suspension and 4x4 hardware, with custom carbon fiber fender flares by Seibon (part #CF-VW-GC-01).

OEM+ off-road bumpers by Rally Design (front bumper part #RD-VW-GC-F, rear bumper part #RD-VW-GC-R) with integrated PIAA 520 HID lights (part #05201) and a custom bull bar by ARB (part #3500020) for front-end protection.

Custom suspension lift by H&R (part #51650-1) with 50mm of additional ground clearance, paired with Bilstein B8 4600 series dampers (part #24-247466) and Eibach Pro-Kit springs (part #2043.120), finished with custom 16" OZ Racing Ultraleggera wheels (part #HLT165087) wrapped in BFGoodrich KM3 tires (215/65R16).
